steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the locations of the two specimens. The correct choice must name both locations and use language that highlights the difference between them.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: emphasizes similarity rather than contrast between the locations. ✗
  • Choice B: names both locations (Boston and Tokyo) and uses ‘while’ to signal the contrast. ✓
  • Choice C: describes only one location, so no contrast is drawn. ✗
  • Choice D: ignores location entirely. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
